ingredients.name: Hokuso Flower Hill BBQ Garden
ingredients.localName: 北総花の丘バーベキューガーデン
ingredients.entityContext: This BBQ park in the Hokuso Flower Hill area appears in episode 2 as a background location in the Chiba New Town suburb where Ai and her friends navigate their daily lives. The open green space reflects the quiet, slightly empty feel of the planned city that defines the anime's atmosphere.

ingredients.entityContext: A street near this building in Inzai appears in episode 1 as part of Ai's suburban neighborhood, establishing the ordinary Chiba New Town backdrop against which her extraordinary battles play out.

ingredients.localName: 印西市立内野小学校付近
ingredients.entityContext: The roads around Uchino Elementary School appear in episode 5 as Ai moves through her neighborhood. The familiar suburban school environs contrast with the surreal dream-world sequences Ai enters each night.

ingredients.entityContext: A street near this pharmacy appears in episode 1, one of the many recognizable Inzai neighborhood locations fans match to the quiet everyday world Ai navigates before and after her nightly battles.

ingredients.entityContext: The area near Kechienji temple appears in the opening credits sequence, its quiet rural-suburban character blending with the melancholy atmosphere that defines Wonder Egg Priority's visual style.

ingredients.entityContext: The post office area appears in the special episode, part of the recognizable Chiba New Town Oguradai district streets that ground the anime's story in a very specific suburban Chiba setting.

ingredients.localName: 印西市 高花学校給食センター付近

ingredients.entityContext: Kosumosuo Bridge (こすもす大橋) over the canal in Inzai appears in episode 6, one of the bridges near Ai's home that fans photograph to reconstruct her route through Chiba New Town.

ingredients.description: WEST VILLE — local spot in Abiko, near 手賀沼 and Murakawa Summer Villa. Not listed on Google Maps, but the coordinates fall in this area — a verified scene location. Navigate by coordinates / Street View.
ingredients.entityContext: This residential area near Abiko (手賀沼 area) appears in the special episode as an off-grid location, with the quiet semi-rural suburban streets providing an atmospheric backdrop for a scene outside the main Inzai territory.
